case_title: JOEL FLAMENCO VS. MICHELLE FRANCES BROWNER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLAMENCO, JOEL (DRIVER) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES ( DRIVER ) THE PHOTOGRAPHS OF BOTH CARS DEMONSTRATED THIS ACCIDENT CAUSED LITTLE DAMAGE AND INVOLVED LITTLE FORCE. PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES ARE NOT CAUSALLY LINKED TO THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES ( DRIVER )
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY THE HON. CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JOEL FLAMENCO, DEFENDANT MICHELLE FRANCES BROWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FLAMENCO, JOEL (DRIVER) AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES ( DRIVER ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-13-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES ( DRIVER )
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED OCT-04-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES ( DRIVER )
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
